input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.13.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.13.2
            TITLE: mounting plates welded to roll hoop bracing must be 2.0 mm (0.080 in) minimum thickness

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.13.2: Mounting plates welded to Roll Hoop Bracing must be 2.0 mm (0.080 in) minimum thickness
F.5.13.2 Mounting plates welded to Roll Hoop Bracing must be 2.0 mm (0.080 in) minimum thickness 
steel.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 37 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Mounting plates welded to Roll Hoop Bracing must be 2.0 mm (0.080 in) minimum thickness steel.
